pr.title: Record: 10L Int5-MLP + BigramHash(10240) + SWA(0.4) + WD=0.04 (val_bpb=1.1428, mean 3 seeds)

output.summary: Mixed int5 MLP/int6 attention quantization buys space for a 10-layer GPT with MuonWD regularization, SWA late averaging, and BigramHash.
techniques: Mixed int5 MLP / int6 attention quantization to shrink artifact size
Muon optimizer with WD=0.04 plus SmearGate/BigramHash architectural tweaks
SWA averaging from final 40% of warmdown checkpoints
